content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(4, 7, 3), (5, 6, 3), (5, 8, 10), (1, 2, 11), (1, 5, 12), (0, 2, 15), (2, 7, 21), (6, 7, 21), (3, 8, 22), (7, 9, 24), (4, 5, 26), (2, 5, 27), (2, 6, 28)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 7 exactly at time 21.

First, we will go through each edge and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (4, 7, 3) has node 4 and time 3. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (5, 6, 3) has node 5 and time 3. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (5, 8, 10) has node 5 and time 10. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 2, 11) has node 1 and time 11. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (1, 5, 12) has node 1 and time 12. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (0, 2, 15) has node 0 and time 15. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (2, 7, 21) has node 2 and time 21. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (6, 7, 21) has node 6 and time 21. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (3, 8, 22) has node 3 and time 22. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (7, 9, 24) has node 7 and time 24. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 5, 26) has node 4 and time 26. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (2, 5, 27) has node 2 and time 27. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (2, 6, 28) has node 2 and time 28. -> Add node 6.

Now we have collected all the nodes that are linked with node 7 at time 21.

Answer: [7, 6, 5, 4, 2, 8, 9, 26, 27, 28]
